scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --package-lock=false --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm install --prefix server --package-lock=false --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm install --prefix client --package-lock=false --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/
